domain: Sufi whirling sema (Mevlevi Order UNESCO; left-foot pivot + right-foot 360 rotation; multi-dervish concentric rings rotating around central divine heart; phase-coherent group rotation)
specific_mechanism: Fixed-pivot activation rotation steering at multiple layers; concentric rotation rings maintained at coherent angular velocity across layers.
llm_application: DERVISH-RING: multi-layer phase-coherent activation steering. At each layer L, a 'pivot direction' p_L is fixed (a specified semantic axis in activation space). Activation a_L is rotated by angle θ_L around p_L to project into a target behavioral basin. CONCENTRIC RING structure: rotation angles θ_L are constrained to follow a calibrated layer-wise progression (e.g., θ_L = L * Δθ) maintaining phase coherence across layers (each layer's rotation completes one revolution synchronously). Differs from Angular Steering (single-layer rotation 0-360), Spherical Steering 2602.08169 (single-layer + vMF gating), PSR (single-layer mimics prompts) by combining (a) MULTI-LAYER coherent rotation, (b) FIXED-PIVOT per layer, (c) CALIBRATED layer-wise angular progression.
novelty_claim: Spherical Steering + Angular Steering + PSR + Conceptors already cover activation rotation. DERVISH-RING recombines multi-layer + phase-coherent angular progression. Recombination.
